name: cubicalgolfer
description: CubicalGolfer.com — Programmatic SEO Golf Media Engine

scripts.build: astro build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('public/_redirects')) fs.copyFileSync('public/_redirects','dist/_redirects'); else fs.writeFileSync('dist/_redirects','')" && node scripts/fix-cons.js && node scripts/stamp-build.js
